1: 🚨 **High Diabetes Risk**: Your cluster has high diabetes prevalence. Urgent: Get HbA1c test, see endocrinologist, implement lifestyle changes immediately.
🏋️ **Weight Management**: Your BMI indicates obesity. Aim for 5-7% weight loss through calorie deficit (500 cal/day) and regular exercise.
🏃 **Get Moving**: Low physical activity detected. Start with 30 min walks daily, progress to 150 min/week moderate exercise.
🚭 **Quit Smoking**: Smoking significantly increases diabetes risk. Seek cessation programs, nicotine replacement therapy, or counseling.
💊 **Blood Pressure Control**: High BP prevalence in your group. Monitor BP regularly, reduce sodium intake, manage stress, consult doctor about medication.
🩺 **Cholesterol Management**: High cholesterol common in your group. Reduce saturated fats, increase omega-3s, consider statin therapy if prescribed.
❤️ **Overall Health**: Poor general health reported. Schedule comprehensive medical check-up, address chronic conditions, focus on preventive care.
🤕 **Physical Health**: High number of poor physical health days. Consult healthcare provider, physical therapy may help, manage chronic pain.
👴 **Senior Health**: Age increases diabetes risk. Prioritize regular screenings, maintain muscle mass through strength training, ensure adequate vitamin D.
